spec:
source_of_truth: repo files
done_criteria: each changed file has approve fix reject verdict
approval_boundary: no external actions
hard_stops: stop after 10 files
no_op_condition: no changed files
output_packet: packet with evidence
first_manual_dry_run: required

source_of_truth: queue.json
done_criteria: good
approval_boundary: no external actions
hard_stops: stop after one queue
no_op_condition: empty queue
output_packet: packet with evidence
first_manual_dry_run: required

done_criteria: every row has pass fail status
approval_boundary: no external actions
hard_stops: stop after 20 rows
no_op_condition: empty rows
output_packet: packet with evidence
first_manual_dry_run: required

source_of_truth: drafts folder
done_criteria: each draft has approve fix reject verdict
hard_stops: stop after 5 drafts
no_op_condition: no drafts
output_packet: packet with evidence
first_manual_dry_run: required

source_of_truth: status.md
done_criteria: every exception has owner and next action
approval_boundary: no external actions
no_op_condition: no exceptions
output_packet: packet with evidence
first_manual_dry_run: required

source_of_truth: input.json
done_criteria: output status equals reviewed
approval_boundary: no external actions
hard_stops: stop after one file
output_packet: packet with evidence
first_manual_dry_run: required

source_of_truth: release notes
done_criteria: proof packet has screenshot and caveat
approval_boundary: no external actions
hard_stops: stop after one release
no_op_condition: no release notes
first_manual_dry_run: required

source_of_truth: feedback log
done_criteria: every correction is mapped to a reusable rule
approval_boundary: no external actions
hard_stops: stop after 15 corrections
no_op_condition: no new feedback
output_packet: packet with evidence

risk: R4
maturity: L4
scope: customer production
source_of_truth: customer workflow docs
done_criteria: every rollout step has pass fail evidence
approval_boundary: publish requires approval
hard_stops: stop on missing approval
no_op_condition: no rollout changes
output_packet: packet with evidence
first_manual_dry_run: required

risk: R3
scope: customer update
source_of_truth: draft queue
done_criteria: every update has approve fix reject verdict
approval_boundary: send requires approval
hard_stops: stop after 3 drafts
no_op_condition: no drafts
output_packet: packet with evidence
first_manual_dry_run: required
tools_and_permissions: read queue and write local packet
state_location: STATE.md
run_artifacts: checkpoint.json output-packet.md
schedule_decision: only after manual pass

source_of_truth: tests folder
done_criteria: until satisfied
approval_boundary: no external actions
hard_stops: stop after test command
no_op_condition: no changed tests
output_packet: packet with evidence
first_manual_dry_run: required

source_of_truth: claims.md
done_criteria: every claim has source file and line evidence
approval_boundary: no external actions
hard_stops: stop after 30 claims
no_op_condition: no claims
output_packet: packet with evidence
first_manual_dry_run: required

risk: R4
scope: production publish
source_of_truth: approved drafts
done_criteria: every draft has approval id
approval_boundary: publish requires approval
hard_stops: stop on missing approval
no_op_condition: no approved drafts
output_packet: packet with evidence
first_manual_dry_run: required
tools_and_permissions: read local drafts only
state_location: STATE.md
run_artifacts: checkpoint.json output-packet.md
maker_checker_split: maker and checker differ
schedule_decision: only after manual pass

risk: R3
scope: subjective review
source_of_truth: design notes
done_criteria: every item has approve fix reject verdict
approval_boundary: no external actions
hard_stops: stop after 8 items
no_op_condition: no design notes
output_packet: packet with evidence
first_manual_dry_run: required
tools_and_permissions: read docs and write packet
state_location: STATE.md
run_artifacts: checkpoint.json output-packet.md
schedule_decision: only after manual pass
approval_artifact: approval-request.yaml

done_criteria: every task has owner and next action

output_packet: packet with evidence
first_manual_dry_run: required
